canonical_definition: A logit-based hallucination detection method that identifies hallucinations by focusing on the uncertainty of key tokens rather than all tokens in a sequence.
papers: Beyond Sequences: Two-dimensional Representation and Dependency Encoding for Code Generation
PerSphere: A Comprehensive Framework for Multi-Faceted Perspective Retrieval and Summarization
